name: Group Policy Preferences - GPP Password Extraction from SYSVOL
description: Detects GPP password extraction from SYSVOL via findstr cpassword, Get-GPPPassword, CrackMapExec GPP module, and direct SYSVOL XML file access for credential harvesting.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "findstr.exe" and process.args : "*cpassword*") or process.args : ("*Get-GPPPassword*", "*GPPPassword*", "*gpp-decrypt*", "*Groups.xml*") or (process.args : "*SYSVOL*" and process.args : "*.xml*"))
